title: Allies Join the Rescue
description: Luffy and the crew push toward the station as Robin’s forced departure and the storm make every minute matter.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, this part follows Luffy, Franky, Nami, Zoro, Sanji. Luffy and the crew push toward the station as Robin’s forced departure and the storm make every minute matter.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: When a man's made a ship...

summary: Luffy and the crew push toward the station as Robin’s forced departure and the storm make every minute matter.
